# Snowflake + Iterable One Pager - Iterable

## Snowflake + Iterable One Pager

**Published by**

January 1, 2019

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Snowflake-Iterable_Resource.png)

Snowflake Data Sharing enables mutual customers to securely share and access valuable Iterable-generated first-party user data directly within their Snowflake account, giving organizations reliable and secure access to shared data in a frictionless way.
